evaluation.summary: Adding horizontal heat transport to the latitudinal EBM does not alter the global climate sensitivity, though it introduces spatial temperature variability and resolves NaNs in albedo-cloud coupling.
next_directions: Investigate stronger or variable heat transport coefficients to assess their effect on spatial climate sensitivity.
Examine the impact of more complex albedo-cloud feedbacks on model stability and climate metrics.
Perform comprehensive sensitivity and uncertainty analyses to identify parameter regimes where spatial coupling yields novel climate behavior.
